overview: A professional momo shop website demo showcasing a local Nepalese restaurant. Features a full digital menu, hero branding, customer testimonials, location/hours info, and strong call-to-action buttons — built to help pitch web presence to a local business owner.
features: Hero section with restaurant branding and Order Now CTA
Digital menu with category tabs (Momos, Curries, Street Food, Drinks, Desserts)
Food photography with dish names, descriptions, prices, and dietary labels
Location, hours, and clickable contact info
Contact form for catering and bulk orders
